contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Cache QR code assignments in treasury snapshot (schema v5) — eliminates 3.5s GAS cold-start for DApp inventory holdings page
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/pull/10
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/60
  
  Details:
  Investigated slow loading on view_inventory_holdings.html (3.5s QR GAS endpoint). Found no QR cache existed — every DApp page fetched the full 1156-row QR list from Google Apps Script, filtering client-side. Added QR code reading to the treasury-cache-publisher GAS (same spreadsheet, Agroverse QR codes tab). Each manager entry in dao_offchain_treasury.json now includes a qr_codes[] array (schema v5). Added getManagerQrCodes adapter to treasury_cache.js. Updated view_inventory_holdings.html to use CDN cache (~0.3s) with GAS fallback, and parallelized the two data fetches via Promise.all. Result: ~90% faster page load for manager QR data. Deployed GAS + triggered cache republish (1092 QRs assigned across 21 managers). Agent: DeepSeek via opencode CLI.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
